title: Disney's 'Infinity Vision' for 'Doomsday' doesn't compare, IMAX CEO says
excerpt: IMAX CEO Rich Gelfond reacted to Disney's "Infinity Vision" format for "Avengers: Doomsday," saying it's just marketing.
content_html:
Exclusive

IMAX's CEO isn't buying Disney's 'Infinity Vision' pitch for 'Avengers: Doomsday': It's just 'marketing'

By Jason Guerrasio

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

Two of the holiday season's biggest releases, "Dune: Part 3" and "Avengers: Doomsday," are on a collision course of "Barbenheimer"-like proportions come December 18 — but IMAX CEO Rich Gelfond thinks "Dune" already has the upper hand.

The third installment in Denis Villeneuve's series has already secured IMAX and IMAX 70mm screens for opening weekend, leaving Marvel's "Doomsday," which will bring back MCU Phase One characters to face off against Doctor Doom (Robert Downey Jr.), out in the cold.

Though "Doomsday" fans won't be able to see the movie in IMAX, Disney announced its own large-format, high-fidelity option in April: "Infinity Vision," which gives non-IMAX theaters with premium large-format screens Disney's technical seal of approval.

The Infinity Vision website describes it as a certification that will guarantee moviegoers an "exceptional film presentation."

"This includes big screens, with bright images and outstanding sound," the website states. "When you see the Infinity Vision badge, you know you are in for an incredible theatrical experience."

When asked about Infinity Vision, IMAX CEO Gelfond said his company is still the gold standard.

"It's not a new technological advance in any way; it's a marketing initiative, because Disney could not play 'Avengers' in IMAX because we had committed to 'Dune 3," Gelfond told Business Insider.

"Disney really wanted to figure out a way that they could market to audiences. So they created this initiative," he added. "It's not going to open an additional projection system. It's not going to add any special look or feel to the film. It is a way to market 'Avengers.' We'll find out if it works or not." 

Disney did not respond to a request for comment.

IMAX is on a hot streak lately, with filmmakers not only having their movies formatted for its screens, but also shooting on its cameras. Christopher Nolan has been the leader of this craze, shooting his latest movie, "The Odyssey," entirely with IMAX cameras — a first. "Dune: Part 3" is also riding the IMAX wave, with director Denis Villeneuve shooting select scenes with IMAX cameras.

IMAX tickets for movies shot at least partially in the format have been selling like hot cakes: Presales of "The Odyssey" in IMAX 70mm sold out within hours a year before the movie's opening. In the movie's opening weekend, IMAX reported earning $51.8 million globally for its showings, more than 20% of the movie's worldwide box office of $264.1 million.

"The numbers this movie is going to do for IMAX are going to be among the best numbers in IMAX history," Gelfond said of "The Odyssey."

Still, chances are, "Doomsday" will do just fine. Fellow Marvel release "Spider-Man: Brand New Day" will also not have any IMAX screens in the US when it opens on July 30, and it's on track to have a $200 million-plus opening at the domestic box office.

Jason Guerrasio is an award-winning entertainment correspondent at Business Insider and has covered various aspects of the film industry for close to two decades. It has since been made into the HBO documentary "MoviePass, MovieCrash."Previous to BI, Jason was the managing editor at Filmmaker Magazine, one of the leading publications in the independent film industry. He's also written for numerous publications over the years, including Vanity Fair, Esquire, Rolling Stone, Vulture, Variety, and indieWire.Popular ArticlesGrowing up Marvel: The tormented life of Stan Lee's child, JC LeeA bullet. blocks.html_en: The third installment in Denis Villeneuve's series has already secured IMAX and IMAX 70mm screens for opening weekend, leaving Marvel's "Doomsday," which will bring back MCU Phase One characters to face off against Doctor Doom (Robert Downey Jr.), out in the cold.

sentences.zh: 丹尼斯·维伦纽瓦系列的第三部已经在首映周末锁定了 IMAX 和 IMAX 70 毫米银幕，这使得漫威的《世界末日》将回归 MCU 第一阶段的角色，与末日博士（小罗伯特·唐尼饰）对峙。

blocks.html_en: Though "Doomsday" fans won't be able to see the movie in IMAX, Disney announced its own large-format, high-fidelity option in April: "Infinity Vision," which gives non-IMAX theaters with premium large-format screens Disney's technical seal of approval.

sentences.zh: 尽管《世界末日》的粉丝无法在 IMAX 上观看这部电影，但迪士尼在 4 月份宣布了自己的大画幅高保真选项：“Infinity Vision”，为拥有优质大画幅屏幕的非 IMAX 影院提供了迪士尼的技术认可。

blocks.html_en: "This includes big screens, with bright images and outstanding sound," the website states. "When you see the Infinity Vision badge, you know you are in for an incredible theatrical experience."

blocks.html_en: When asked about Infinity Vision, IMAX CEO Gelfond said his company is still the gold standard.

blocks.html_en: "It's not a new technological advance in any way; it's a marketing initiative, because Disney could not play 'Avengers' in IMAX because we had committed to 'Dune 3," Gelfond told Business Insider.

sentences.en: "It's not a new technological advance in any way; it's a marketing initiative, because Disney could not play 'Avengers' in IMAX because we had committed to 'Dune 3," Gelfond told Business Insider.
sentences.zh: 格尔方德告诉《商业内幕》，“这无论如何都不是一项新技术进步；这是一项营销举措，因为迪士尼无法在 IMAX 上播放《复仇者联盟》，因为我们已经承诺了《沙丘 3》。”

blocks.html_en: "Disney really wanted to figure out a way that they could market to audiences. So they created this initiative," he added. "It's not going to open an additional projection system. It's not going to add any special look or feel to the film. It is a way to market 'Avengers.' We'll find out if it works or not."

sentences.en: It's not going to add any special look or feel to the film.

sentences.en: It is a way to market 'Avengers.'
sentences.zh: 这是推销《复仇者联盟》的一种方式。

sentences.en: We'll find out if it works or not."
sentences.zh: 我们会知道它是否有效。”

blocks.html_en: Disney did not respond to a request for comment.

blocks.html_en: IMAX is on a hot streak lately, with filmmakers not only having their movies formatted for its screens, but also shooting on its cameras. Christopher Nolan has been the leader of this craze, shooting his latest movie, "The Odyssey," entirely with IMAX cameras — a first. "Dune: Part 3" is also riding the IMAX wave, with director Denis Villeneuve shooting select scenes with IMAX cameras.

sentences.en: IMAX is on a hot streak lately, with filmmakers not only having their movies formatted for its screens, but also shooting on its cameras.
sentences.zh: IMAX 最近很火爆，电影制片人不仅根据 IMAX 屏幕格式化电影，还用 IMAX 摄像机进行拍摄。

sentences.en: Christopher Nolan has been the leader of this craze, shooting his latest movie, "The Odyssey," entirely with IMAX cameras — a first.
sentences.zh: 克里斯托弗·诺兰 (Christopher Nolan) 一直是这股热潮的引领者，他的最新电影《奥德赛》完全使用 IMAX 摄影机拍摄，这在业内尚属首次。

sentences.en: "Dune: Part 3" is also riding the IMAX wave, with director Denis Villeneuve shooting select scenes with IMAX cameras.
sentences.zh: 《沙丘：第三部分》也掀起了 IMAX 浪潮，导演丹尼斯·维伦纽瓦 (Denis Villeneuve) 使用 IMAX 摄影机拍摄了部分场景。

blocks.html_en: IMAX tickets for movies shot at least partially in the format have been selling like hot cakes: Presales of "The Odyssey" in IMAX 70mm sold out within hours a year before the movie's opening. In the movie's opening weekend, IMAX reported earning $51.8 million globally for its showings, more than 20% of the movie's worldwide box office of $264.1 million.

sentences.en: IMAX tickets for movies shot at least partially in the format have been selling like hot cakes: Presales of "The Odyssey" in IMAX 70mm sold out within hours a year before the movie's opening.
sentences.zh: 至少部分采用这种格式拍摄的电影的 IMAX 门票一直热销：IMAX 70mm 电影《奥德赛》的预售在电影上映前的几个小时内就售罄。

sentences.en: In the movie's opening weekend, IMAX reported earning $51.8 million globally for its showings, more than 20% of the movie's worldwide box office of $264.1 million.
sentences.zh: 据 IMAX 报道，该片首映周末全球票房收入为 5180 万美元，占该片全球票房 2.641 亿美元的 20% 以上。

blocks.html_en: "The numbers this movie is going to do for IMAX are going to be among the best numbers in IMAX history," Gelfond said of "The Odyssey."

sentences.en: "The numbers this movie is going to do for IMAX are going to be among the best numbers in IMAX history," Gelfond said of "The Odyssey."
sentences.zh: “这部电影将为 IMAX 带来的票房收入将成为 IMAX 历史上最好的票房收入之一，”格尔方德在谈到《奥德赛》时说道。

blocks.html_en: Still, chances are, "Doomsday" will do just fine. Fellow Marvel release "Spider-Man: Brand New Day" will also not have any IMAX screens in the US when it opens on July 30, and it's on track to have a $200 million-plus opening at the domestic box office.

sentences.en: Still, chances are, "Doomsday" will do just fine.
sentences.zh: 不过，《世界末日》很有可能会表现得很好。

sentences.en: Fellow Marvel release "Spider-Man: Brand New Day" will also not have any IMAX screens in the US when it opens on July 30, and it's on track to have a $200 million-plus opening at the domestic box office.
sentences.zh: 漫威电影《蜘蛛侠：崭新的一天》7 月 30 日在美国上映时也不会在 IMAX 银幕上上映，但国内首映票房有望超过 2 亿美元。

IMAX首席执行官不相信迪士尼对《复仇者联盟：世界末日》的“无限视野”宣传：这只是“营销”

假日季最热门的两部影片《沙丘：第三部分》和《复仇者联盟：世界末日》将于 12 月 18 日上映，它们将迎来类似《巴本海默》的冲突，但 IMAX 首席执行官里奇·格尔方德 (Rich Gelfond) 认为《沙丘》已经占据了上风。

丹尼斯·维伦纽瓦系列的第三部已经在首映周末锁定了 IMAX 和 IMAX 70 毫米银幕，这使得漫威的《世界末日》将回归 MCU 第一阶段的角色，与末日博士（小罗伯特·唐尼饰）对峙。

尽管《世界末日》的粉丝无法在 IMAX 上观看这部电影，但迪士尼在 4 月份宣布了自己的大画幅高保真选项：“Infinity Vision”，为拥有优质大画幅屏幕的非 IMAX 影院提供了迪士尼的技术认可。

Infinity Vision 网站将其描述为一项认证，将保证电影观众获得“非凡的电影呈现”。

该网站称：“这包括大屏幕、明亮的图像和出色的声音。” “当您看到无限视觉徽章时，您就知道您将获得令人难以置信的戏剧体验。”

当被问及 Infinity Vision 时，IMAX 首席执行官 Gelfond 表示，他的公司仍然是黄金标准。

格尔方德告诉《商业内幕》，“这无论如何都不是一项新技术进步；这是一项营销举措，因为迪士尼无法在 IMAX 上播放《复仇者联盟》，因为我们已经承诺了《沙丘 3》。”

“迪士尼确实想找到一种向观众推销的方法。 所以他们发起了这个倡议，”他补充道。 “它不会打开额外的投影系统。 它不会给电影添加任何特殊的外观或感觉。 这是推销《复仇者联盟》的一种方式。 我们会知道它是否有效。”

迪士尼没有回应置评请求。

IMAX 最近很火爆，电影制片人不仅根据 IMAX 屏幕格式化电影，还用 IMAX 摄像机进行拍摄。 克里斯托弗·诺兰 (Christopher Nolan) 一直是这股热潮的引领者，他的最新电影《奥德赛》完全使用 IMAX 摄影机拍摄，这在业内尚属首次。 《沙丘：第三部分》也掀起了 IMAX 浪潮，导演丹尼斯·维伦纽瓦 (Denis Villeneuve) 使用 IMAX 摄影机拍摄了部分场景。

至少部分采用这种格式拍摄的电影的 IMAX 门票一直热销：IMAX 70mm 电影《奥德赛》的预售在电影上映前的几个小时内就售罄。 据 IMAX 报道，该片首映周末全球票房收入为 5180 万美元，占该片全球票房 2.641 亿美元的 20% 以上。

“这部电影将为 IMAX 带来的票房收入将成为 IMAX 历史上最好的票房收入之一，”格尔方德在谈到《奥德赛》时说道。

不过，《世界末日》很有可能会表现得很好。 漫威电影《蜘蛛侠：崭新的一天》7 月 30 日在美国上映时也不会在 IMAX 银幕上上映，但国内首映票房有望超过 2 亿美元。

Jason Guerrasio 是《商业内幕》的一位屡获殊荣的娱乐记者，近二十年来一直报道电影业的各个方面。 在该网站上，他的报道范围广泛，从好莱坞一些最大公司的幕后故事，到对娱乐界一些最知名人士的丰富多彩的采访。2020 年，Jason 因其有关 MoviePass 兴衰的故事获得了纽约新闻俱乐部奖和洛杉矶新闻俱乐部奖。 此后，它被制作成 HBO 纪录片“MoviePass，MovieCrash”。在加入 BI 之前，Jason 是独立电影行业领先出版物之一《Filmmaker》杂志的总编辑。 多年来，他还为众多出版物撰写文章，包括《名利场》、《时尚先生》、《滚石》、《Vulture》、《综艺》和《indieWire》。热门文章漫威成长：斯坦·李孩子 JC Lee 的痛苦生活一颗子弹。 一个传奇。 一个谎言。 当局称，巴福德·普瑟杀害了他的妻子。 他的遗产现在发生了什么？从与鲁珀特·默多克的斗争到赢得大卫·芬奇的尊重：《搏击俱乐部》如何从票房惨淡变成 90 年代的邪典经典
